exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: It makes us a better person.
Nature teaches us a lot.
Everything becomes green in the rain.

options: We should make good use of time.

exercises.audioScript: My mother is my best friend.
exercises.hindiScript: मेरी माँ मेरी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The one who wastes time regrets later.
India is a country of diversities.
Books are a treasure of knowledge.
My mother is my best friend.
exercises.answer: My mother is my best friend.

exercises.hindiScript: वह हमेशा मेरा साथ देती है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Health is real wealth.

She always supports me.

exercises.hindiScript: प्रकृति हमें बहुत कुछ सिखाती है।

exercises.audioScript: There are many languages and cultures here.
exercises.hindiScript: यहाँ कई भाषाएँ और संस्कृतियाँ हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Nature teaches us a lot.
Everything becomes green in the rain.

dictationPassage.text: Health is real wealth. We should exercise daily. My mother is my best friend. She always supports me. Nature teaches us a lot.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: स्वास्थ्य ही असली धन है। हमें रोज़ व्यायाम करना चाहिए। मेरी माँ मेरी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त है। वह हमेशा मेरा साथ देती है। प्रकृति हमें बहुत कुछ सिखाती है।
